pattern: A valid BST keeps every value strictly inside a window inherited from its ancestors — going left tightens the upper bound, going right tightens the lower bound.
hints: It is not enough for each node to beat its immediate children; every node must respect all of its ancestors.
Carry a permitted (low, high) range down the tree, narrowing it as you turn left or right.
Equivalently, an inorder walk of a valid BST produces strictly increasing values.

edge_inputs.description: right child is valid locally but violates an ancestor's bound
duplicate equal to root is not strictly greater
deep left grandchild exceeds the root, breaking the global order

stress.description: build a guaranteed-valid BST by inserting random values, then sometimes inject a violation
stress.note: first element non-null; half valid, half corrupted
